spec.description: Total DNS queries processed
spec.title: Total Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question, result_status, response_from | result_status != `not blocked` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name", question_type="type" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{.endpoint}}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","status":"{{.result_status}}","provider":"{{.response_from}}"}`

spec.description: Queries with a notable status: blocked, config blocked, possibly blocked, config allowed, or error
spec.title: Recent Notable Queries

spec.expr: sum by (response_from) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status != `not blocked` [$__interval]))

spec.description: Comparison of blocking by each DNS provider
spec.title: Blocks by Provider

spec.description: Blocked vs Not Blocked queries over time
spec.title: Query Status Over Time

spec.description: Average queries per minute by endpoint
spec.title: Query Statistics by Endpoint

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json | result_status=~`blocked|possibly blocked` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name" [$__range])))

spec.description: Most blocked domains across all providers
spec.title: Top Blocked Domains

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status != `not blocked` [$__range])) by (response_from)

spec.description: Which DNS provider's response was used for blocked queries
spec.title: Response Provider (Blocked)

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider timed out
spec.title: Timed Out Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question, timed_out_providers | timed_out_providers =~ `.*true.*` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name", question_type="type" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{.endpoint}}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider timed out
spec.title: Recent Timed Out Queries

spec.description: Queries blocked by local config (BLOCKED_DOMAINS)
spec.title: Config Blocked

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json | result_status=`config blocked` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name" [$__range])))

spec.description: Most queried domains blocked by local config
spec.title: Top Config-Blocked Domains

spec.description: Queries blocked by at least one DNS provider
spec.title: Blocked Queries

spec.description: Queries allowed by local config (ALLOWED_DOMAINS)
spec.title: Config Allowed

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json | result_status=`config allowed` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name" [$__range])))

spec.description: Most queried domains allowed by local config
spec.title: Top Config-Allowed Domains

spec.description: Queries where all upstream DNS providers failed
spec.title: Provider Errors

spec.description: DNS query volume per client IP over time
spec.title: Requests per Client IP

spec.description: Queries where rebind protection was triggered
spec.title: Rebind Protected Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question, rebind_providers | rebind_providers =~ `.*true.*` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name", question_type="type" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{.endpoint}}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where rebind protection was triggered
spec.title: Recent Rebind Protected Queries

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider failed
spec.title: Failed Providers

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question, failed_providers | failed_providers != `` | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name", question_type="type" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{.endpoint}}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","failed_providers":"{{.failed_providers}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider failed
spec.title: Recent Failed Provider Queries

spec.description: Queries possibly blocked (NXDOMAIN)
spec.title: Possibly Blocked Queries

spec.description: Queries not blocked by any provider
spec.title: Not Blocked Queries

spec.description: DNS query volume over time
spec.title: Query Volume by Status

spec.description: Query volume by device/endpoint
spec.title: Queries by Endpoint

spec.expr: sum by (question_type) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_type="type" [$__range]))

spec.description: Distribution of DNS query types
spec.title: Query Types Distribution

spec.expr: topk(20, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json | line_format `{{.question}}` | json question_name="name" [$__range])))

spec.description: Top queried domains
spec.title: Top 20 Queried Domains

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status = `not blocked` [$__range])) by (response_from)

spec.description: Which DNS provider's response was used for non-blocked queries
spec.title: Response Provider (Not Blocked)
